overview: Concierge-based clinic in Las Vegas specializing in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and comprehensive wellness care. Offers personalized treatment through functional medicine with 24/7 provider access for patients experiencing hormone imbalance.
highlights: Menopause, perimenopause, thyroid, and PCOS specialty
IV drips, vitamin shots, and contrast therapy
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormone imbalance, with specialization in menopause and perimenopause care.
